plan_validation.digest_definition: sha256 of '<relative-path>\t<file-sha256>\n' records sorted by relative path for regular files under plugin-plans/dev-graph, excluding .gate/, .claude/, plan-findings.json, elegant-verification-30.json, verification-state.json

lifecycle_execution.meaning: 50/50 task nodes are recorded done and 25 route reports exist. This state proves dispatch/materialization, not semantic contract fulfillment.

blockers: pending structural discovered task requires explicit approval
build_execution.meaning: The completion gate is blocked despite full structural progress because the third semantic review did not satisfy all four required conditions.

freshness_policy: Any change to a digest input makes the plan receipt stale. Any semantic fix requires a new task-graph route-mode build and another independent content review; this failed third-cycle receipt must not be rewritten as PASS without new evidence.
